ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly legible. ICC Certificate of Origin, Original (1/1), issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.quality_notes: Text-based PDF, clearly legible. Commercial Invoice - Original, No. 11030, dated 11.08.2025, issued by Global Forest Products Sweden AB.

lc_check.lc_verification_reasoning: The certificate contains the text 'L/C NO. 733301LC25000099' in box 5 (Remarks). 'L/C NO.' is a SEPARATE field label (abbreviation of 'Letter of Credit Number'), not a substring within a reference number. This constitutes a clear bankterm designation per rule 2.2. The LC exception is therefore activated. Per rule 2.2, only Country of Origin (4.5) shall be verified; all other checkpoints are NOT_APPLICABLE.

Invoice bottom signature area: 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB'
Invoice header branding: 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS' (logo/branding text)

document_pairing.method: LC exception active. Certificate references invoice no. 10998 but invoice file bears no. 11030. Certificate consignor 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB' is identified as the invoice issuer. Document pairing proceeds with available documents.

criteria_met: Criterion 2: Certificate consignor 'GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB' is identified as invoice issuer in footer block.
criteria_not_met: Criterion 1: Certificate references invoice no. 10998, but invoice bears no. 11030 — numbers do not match.
pairing_validation.result: PASS — at least one criterion met (criterion 2). Pairing is valid.

document_pairing.invoice_number_mismatch_note: Certificate references COMMERCIAL INVOICE NO. 10998, but the invoice file contains invoice No. 11030. These are DIFFERENT invoice numbers. Under the LC exception (2.2), only country of origin is verified; however, this mismatch is noted for traceability.

country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states Country of Origin: SWEDEN (Box 3). Invoice contains explicit origin field: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' in the description column. After normalization (case-insensitive), both values are 'sweden'. The origin is verified via a dedicated origin field in the invoice. MATCH.

Search for explicit origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Found explicit origin field in invoice description column: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'

rules_applied.description: Identification of origin in invoice via 'Country of Origin' field

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 states 'SWEDEN'. Invoice description column contains 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. This is an explicit, dedicated origin field per rule 2.2 critical rule (LC origin verification). Values are identical after case normalization. No ambiguity. Result: MATCH with high confidence.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Origin might not be verifiable because the invoice is for a different shipment
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: The LC exception per rule 2.2 requires only that the origin stated in the certificate can be identified in an explicit origin field in the invoice. The invoice contains 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' which matches. The fact that other details (invoice number, quantities, consignee) differ is irrelevant under the LC exception.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: LC exception check — Letter of Credit
rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: Certificate contains 'L/C NO. 733301LC25000099' in Box 5. 'L/C NO.' is a separate field label constituting a bankterm designation. Per mandatory verification (2.2): (1) Exact text string: 'L/C NO. 733301LC25000099'. (2) This is a SEPARATE field label — 'L/C NO.' stands alone as a label followed by the number. (3) It is NOT part of a reference number. LC exception ACTIVATED.
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: ACTIVATED — only country of origin to be verified

rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: Document A is the certificate file (ICC Certificate of Origin). Document B is the invoice file (Commercial Invoice No. 11030). Pairing follows standard rules. Certificate references invoice no. 10998 but invoice file bears no. 11030 — these are different numbers. However, consignor GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB is identified as invoice issuer.
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Pairing proceeds — consignor match confirms same trading party

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Invoice reference mismatch — certificate references invoice not found in invoice file
rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: Certificate references 'COMMERCIAL INVOICE NO. 10998' but invoice file contains 'No. 11030'. Under normal (non-LC) verification, this would trigger MANUAL_REVIEW per rule 8.5.2. However, LC exception (2.2) has absolute precedence (rule 5, priority 1). Under LC exception, invoice number matching is not required — only country of origin is verified. The LC exception explicitly states that the system shall NOT verify varubeskrivning, kvantitet, avsändare, mottagare, leveransvillkor or 'andra uppgifter'. Invoice number verification falls under 'andra uppgifter'.
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Not applicable under LC exception — LC has absolute precedence per rule 5

rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: Criterion 1 (invoice number match): NOT MET — certificate references 10998, invoice is 11030. Criterion 2 (consignor in invoice): MET — GLOBAL FOREST PRODUCTS SWEDEN AB found in invoice footer. Criterion 3 (consignee in invoice): NOT MET — MINFENG SPECIAL PAPER CO.,LTD. not found in invoice. At least one criterion met → pairing valid.
Certificate Box 3: SWEDEN. Invoice: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. Explicit origin field found. Values match after case normalization.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Identification of origin in invoice — relevant designations
rule_evaluation_log.evaluation: 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' found in invoice description column. This is an explicit, dedicated origin field.
Both 'SWEDEN' (certificate) and 'SWEDEN' (invoice) normalize to 'sweden'. Exact match.
Origin 'SWEDEN' explicitly identified in invoice via dedicated 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN' field. Positive verification achieved.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet innehåller en hänvisning till Letter of Credit (L/C), vilket innebär att enbart ursprungsland behöver verifieras. Certifikatet anger ursprungsland Sverige och fakturan anger 'Country of Origin: Sweden'. Ursprungslandet överensstämmer och dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: LC exception activated based on 'L/C NO. 733301LC25000099' in certificate Box 5. Under LC exception, only Country of Origin is verified. Certificate states SWEDEN, invoice explicitly states 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' — exact match. All other checkpoints set to NOT_APPLICABLE per rule 2.2. Note: This certificate and invoice appear to relate to different shipments (different invoice numbers, different consignees, different quantities, different vessels), but under the LC exception these discrepancies are not evaluated.
discrepancies_noted: Certificate references invoice no. 10998 but the attached invoice is no. 11030 — not evaluated under LC exception.
Certificate consignee (MINFENG SPECIAL PAPER CO.,LTD.) differs from invoice buyer (SHANDONG PUBLISHING FOREIGN TRADE COMPANY LIMITED) — not evaluated under LC exception.
All quantities differ significantly between certificate and invoice — not evaluated under LC exception.
Certificate vessel (MSC BIANCA SILVIA) differs from invoice vessel (MAYVIEW MAERSK) — not evaluated under LC exception.
Certificate L/C no. (733301LC25000099) differs from invoice L/C no. (151591LC25000008) — not evaluated under LC exception.
Certificate contract no. (GFP250528MFSPB) differs from invoice contract no. (2025SDP0423) — not evaluated under LC exception.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport — Certificate of Origin mot Faktura
human_readable_report.lc_exception_note: Letter of Credit-undantag aktiverat baserat på 'L/C NO. 733301LC25000099' i certifikatets anmärkningsfält. Enbart ursprungsland verifieras.

sections.rule_applied: LC-undantag — enbart ursprungsland verifieras vid Letter of Credit
Ursprungsland i certifikatet (Box 3: SWEDEN) identifieras i fakturans explicita ursprungsfält ('COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'). Exakt matchning efter normalisering av versaler/gemener.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger ursprungsland SWEDEN i ruta 3. Fakturan innehåller det explicita fältet 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN' i varubeskrivningssektionen. Värdena är identiska efter normalisering. Kravet i regel 2.2 (LC-undantag) att ursprungslandet ska återfinnas i ett explicit origin-fält i fakturan är uppfyllt. Resultat: MATCH.

human_readable_report.conclusion: LC-undantag aktiverat. Enbart ursprungsland har verifierats. Certifikatets ursprungsland SWEDEN bekräftas av fakturans explicita fält 'COUNTRY OF ORIGIN: SWEDEN'. Alla övriga kontrollpunkter är ej tillämpliga under LC-undantaget. Dokumentparet bedöms som IDENTICAL och kan godkännas automatiskt.

output_quality_checks.consistency_details: All applicable checkpoints (only country_of_origin) have status MATCH. comparison_result = IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation = AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL result. No applicable checkpoint has confidence < 0.85. No motivation contradicts its status.
